summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Simplifile AI MVP including backend APIs, frontend UI, user registration/login flow, dashboard functionality, and plan-based access controls. Fixed critical Select component bug blocking UI interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: Select component had empty string value prop causing React runtime error
ui_bugs.fix_applied: Changed empty string to 'none' value and updated related logic

passed_tests: Backend API health check endpoints working
Subscription plans endpoint returns correct pricing ($9.99, $29.99, $49.99)
User registration creates account with trial status
Landing page loads with hero section and features
Pricing page shows all plans with monthly/annual toggle
Registration page displays 3-day free trial text
Dashboard loads with user stats and trial status
Documents page accessible for basic users
Chat page loads and functions properly (after fix)
Bookkeeping/Reports show upgrade prompts for basic users
Mocked AI responses working in chat

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 critical bug fixed, all core features working)
